name: Sour Cream Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 pint (16 oz) sour cream (more if needed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the potatoes very small and put them into the soup pot with the water.
2. Add the bay leaves, caraway seeds, and salt. Cook until the potatoes are done. Do not drain the water.
3. Stir the flour into the milk to make a paste. Pour this mixture into the soup, stirring constantly while adding. This will thicken the soup.
4. Add the sour cream to the soup, stirring constantly while adding. Let the soup come to a boil and then simmer it slowly for about 10 minutes.
5. Remove the bay leaves and serve hot or cold. Add some chopped scallions as garnish on top of each serving.
